queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the determinants of default associated with borrowers lacking a formal checking account.

queries.feature_definition: Present employment duration: less than 1 year.
queries.question: Statistical impact of employment duration of less than one year on credit risk drivers and default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Loan purpose: purchase of radio or TV.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the credit risk mitigation effects associated with loan purposes for the purchase of consumer electronics.
